title: validate_member_patch accepts non-object non-null member value
description: validate_member_patch only checks value.is_null() before calling value.get('role'). When value is a non-null, non-object JSON value (e.g. 42, 'string', []) value.get('role') returns None (non-objects have no fields), so role silently defaults to SpaceRole::Member and Phase 1 passes. Phase 2 then creates SpaceMemberOp::Upsert with Member role and writes to the DB. Trigger: Space/set with {'members/abc': 42}. Bad behavior: member 'abc' is added with role 'member' instead of the request being rejected with invalidArguments. Fix: add !value.is_object() guard in the non-null branch of validate_member_patch.
close_reason: Fixed: is_object guard in validate_member_patch + test; SELECT 1 in update_space_fully; decision record filed
